Warning notice: wilsonpartner[dot]com
Warning notice: wilsonpartner[dot]com
08.03.24
•
Supervision and Regulation
The Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that the operator of the website wilsonpartner[dot]com is not licensed or registered by the FMA.
In particular, the operator of the website wilsonpartner[dot]com is not permitted to provide financial services requiring a licence or registration by the FMA. It is highly recommended not to use website wilsonpartner[dot]com for financial services, in particular not to respond to offers or to transfer funds.
